description: A demo fractional asset referencing voluntary carbon-market credits with batch tracking, project disclosure, and transferable on-chain shares. The asset does not claim fixed yield and serves as a non-yielding RWA display sample.

docs.label: Project overview
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Describes the credit project type and batch narrative.

docs.label: Verification summary
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Shows an illustrative emissions-reduction verification workflow.

docs.label: Retirement rules
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Explains illustrative usage and retirement paths for demo credits.
